description: Configure the 'Participatory Budgeting 2026' survey to display public results while protecting respondent privacy. Login to LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). Enable public statistics and public graphs in the presentation settings. Configure the 'Project Preference' question to be visible in public statistics as a pie chart and the 'Priority Score' question to be visible in public statistics. Ensure the 'Zip Code' and 'Household Income' questions are hidden from public statistics. Activate the survey.
